blended.narrative: Showdown Montana is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,217 ft. Looking ahead, 24 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 17°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 6.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 11" over the past week. Current depth: 46".
